name: discover_urls
description: Discovers and extracts all URLs from a web page or HTML content. Use this skill to find links for crawling, build site maps, or discover related pages. Can filter URLs by domain, pattern, or type.

url.description: The URL of the page to extract links from. The page will be fetched and parsed.

html.description: Raw HTML content to extract URLs from. Use instead of url when you already have the HTML.

domain_filter.description: Optional domain to filter URLs (e.g., 'example.com' returns only same-domain links).

max_urls.description: Maximum number of URLs to return. Default is 100.
